title: Plan multi-datacenter replication
description: Use NetworkTopologyStrategy with per-DC replication and LOCAL_QUORUM to keep reads local and survive a DC outage.
body: Use when deploying across regions for locality or disaster recovery. Actions: set NetworkTopologyStrategy with an explicit replication factor per datacenter, use LOCAL_QUORUM for reads and writes so operations complete within the local DC without cross-region latency, and configure clients with a DC-aware load-balancing policy. Verify a read-after-write within one DC and a failover to another DC. Validation signals include LOCAL_QUORUM operations staying within the local datacenter latency and the cluster surviving the loss of one DC. Risk boundary: using QUORUM (global) instead of LOCAL_QUORUM forces cross-DC round trips and ties availability to remote regions, so confirm the CL is LOCAL_QUORUM before claiming DC independence.
